## Description

Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New model implementation
- [ ] Dataset / data loader addition
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Reproducibility / results addition
- [ ] Infrastructure / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Code runs locally without errors
- [ ] No datasets, checkpoints, or large output files are committed
- [ ] README and/or MODEL_ZOO.md updated if a new model is added
- [ ] Citation for original paper added (in model file and MODEL_ZOO.md)
- [ ] PROTOCOL.md and RESULTS.md updated if new results are included
- [ ] Scripts under `scripts/` are provided and reproduce the reported results
- [ ] If new dependencies are added, `requirements.txt` and `environment.yml` are updated

## Related Issue

Closes # (if applicable)

Add any other context or notes for the reviewer here.
